subject: A split-panel image: left side shows a fire-and-ice elemental creature; right side shows a goblin or small humanoid inventor firing lightning in a stormy environment
description: The art crop shows two distinct panels side-by-side, reflecting the split-card nature of the card. The left panel depicts a large elemental being composed of fire and ice — a dark central mass surrounded by orange-yellow flame above and icy blue-white spires below, suggesting a creature of extreme elemental contrast. The right panel shows a small, armored figure (likely a goblin given the build and proportions) standing in a stormy blue environment and hurling or channeling a bolt of lightning or blue-fire energy upward toward a looming, shadowed giant form above it. The overall palette is strongly contrasting: warm orange-gold on the left, cool electric blue on the right.
foreground: Left: fire-and-ice elemental; Right: small armored figure hurling lightning
background: Left: dark center mass; Right: stormy blue with looming giant silhouette
